english: Taiwanese beverage chain Xing Fu Tang

etymology.description: 幸福堂 (Xìngfú Táng) is the name of a Taiwanese beverage chain. The word is composed of 幸福 (幸福) (xìngfú, "happiness; bliss") and 堂 (堂) (táng, "hall; place"). The combination represents a "hall" or "place" devoted to "happiness" or "bliss," implying a place where customers can experience joy and satisfaction through their products.
etymology.interpretation: 幸福 (xìngfú, "happiness; bliss") embodies the idea of personal well-being and joy. 堂 (táng, "hall; place") signifies a formal or impressive space. When combined, the name suggests a welcoming space that promises delight and satisfaction, a concept appealing to customers of a beverage chain.

examples.chinese: 我喜欢去幸福堂(幸福堂)买饮料。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān qù Xìngfú Táng mǎi yǐnliào.
examples.english: I like to go to Xing Fu Tang to buy drinks.

examples.chinese: 幸福堂(幸福堂)的珍珠奶茶非常好喝。
examples.pinyin: Xìngfú Táng de zhēnzhū nǎichá fēicháng hǎo hē.
examples.english: The bubble tea from Xing Fu Tang is very delicious.

examples.chinese: 每次朋友来访(每次朋友來訪)，我们都会去幸福堂(我們都會去幸福堂)。
examples.pinyin: Měi cì péngyǒu lái fǎng, wǒmen dōu huì qù Xìngfú Táng.
examples.english: Every time friends visit, we go to Xing Fu Tang.
